droid.missions.title: Mission Settings

droid.legacyVersions.title: Legacy Versions
droid.legacyVersions.autoUpdateHint: After downloading a legacy version, it's recommended to disable auto update to prevent it from being overwritten.
droid.settings.title: Settings
droid.settings.envConflict.title: Environment Variable Conflict
droid.settings.envConflict.description: If you're using Claude Code and encounter 401 errors with custom models, it may be caused by the ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN environment variable conflicting with your custom model's API key.
droid.settings.envConflict.solution: Solution: Delete or comment out the ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN environment variable in your shell config file (e.g., ~/.zshrc, ~/.bashrc, or PowerShell profile), then restart your terminal or system.
droid.settings.disableAutoUpdate.title: Try Disable Auto Update
droid.settings.disableAutoUpdate.descrip: Add FACTORY_DROID_AUTO_UPDATE_ENABLED=0 to your shell config file to disable Droid auto update.
droid.settings.disableAutoUpdate.warning: This may not work in all cases. You need to restart your terminal and the app for changes to take effect.
droid.settings.disableAutoUpdate.instruc: Add the following line to your shell config file:

claude.settings.title: Claude Code Settings
claude.settings.general.title: General
claude.settings.general.hint: Top-level settings applied to every Claude session that uses this file.
claude.settings.general.autoUpdateHint: When off, sets autoUpdate=false. To disable updates entirely, also set DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER=1 in env.
claude.settings.general.includeCoAuthore: Whether to add the co-authored-by Claude byline in git commits and pull requests.
claude.settings.general.cleanupPeriodDay: Session files older than this many days are deleted at startup (default 30, minimum 1).
claude.settings.permissions.title: Permissions
claude.settings.permissions.hint: Controls how Claude prompts you before tool use.
claude.settings.permissions.defaultModeH: permissions.defaultMode applied when opening Claude with this settings file.
claude.settings.permissions.disableBypas: Set to "disable" to block --dangerously-skip-permissions and bypassPermissions defaultMode.
claude.settings.permissions.skipDangerou: Skips the warning shown before entering bypass permissions mode. Ignored when set in project settings.
This is a project-style settings file. Claude Code ignores this flag when loaded from project sources to protect against untrusted repos.

claude.model.capabilityWarningBody: "{{model}}" doesn't look like an official Claude model id. Reasoning effort and thinking flags may not apply if the upstream gateway maps it to a non-Anthropic backend.
claude.model.context1MSupportHint: Appends [1m] suffix to the model name. Claude Code natively strips this and enables the extended context window (up to 1M tokens) via the anthropic-beta header.

claude.reasoning.hint: Maps to env.CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL / CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ADAPTIVE_THINKING / CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_THINKING and root alwaysThinkingEnabled.
